plugins.name: backend-review
plugins.description: Independent fresh-context code reviewer for Java/Spring backends — concurrency & transaction correctness, layering, OWASP Top 10 security, and data-access guardrails (read-only generated SQL, tenant filtering, PII masking, audit).

plugins.name: spring-test-patterns
plugins.description: Convention-driven Spring Boot integration test patterns — Testcontainers + WireMock JSON fixtures with per-test auto-registration, @TestNamespace partitioning, and mandatory cross-tenant coverage.
